# --- SYSTEM GLOBAL / HARDENING ---
config system global
    set hostname FGT-ZTP
    set timezone Europe/Rome
    set admintimeout 10
    set strong-crypto enable
    set admin-https-redirect enable
    set admin-lockout-threshold 3
    set admin-lockout-duration 120
end

# --- INTERFACCE ---
config system interface
    edit port10
        set mode static
        set ip 10.0.99.2 255.255.255.0
        set allowaccess ping https ssh fgfm
        set alias "MGMT"
    next
    edit port1
        set mode dhcp
        set allowaccess ping
        set alias "WAN"
        set role wan
    next
end

# --- API USER (REST, osservabilita' SentinelNet) ---
config system api-user
    edit sentinelnet
        set accprofile readonly
        config trusthost
            edit 1
                set ipv4-trusthost 10.0.0.0 255.255.255.0
            next
            edit 2
                set ipv4-trusthost 10.1.0.5 255.255.255.255
            next
        end
    next
end
# Dopo il primo boot generare il token:
#   execute api-user generate-key sentinelnet

# --- CENTRAL MANAGEMENT (ZTP) ---
config system central-management
    set type fortimanager
    set fmg 10.0.0.50
end

# --- SECURITY FABRIC ---
config system csf
    set status enable
    set group-name FABRIC-HQ
end

# --- NETFLOW ---
config system netflow
    set collector-ip 10.0.0.60
end

# --- LOG RICHIESTE REST API ---
config log setting
    set rest-api-set enable
    set rest-api-get enable
end

# --- HIGH AVAILABILITY ---
config system ha
    set group-name HA-HQ
    set mode a-p
    set password HaSecret!
    set hbdev port9 50
    set session-pickup enable
    set override enable
    set priority 200
    set ha-mgmt-status enable
    config ha-mgmt-interfaces
        edit 1
            set interface port10
        next
    end
    set ha-direct enable
end
config system interface
    edit port10
        set ip 10.0.99.3 255.255.255.0
        set allowaccess ping https ssh fgfm
        set dedicated-to management
    next
end
